instruction: In the Reminders app, delete the reminder titled "Old grocery draft".
reference_command:
reminder_id=$(remindctl all --json | jq -r '.[] | select(.title == "Old grocery draft") | .id' | head -n 1)
if [ -z "$reminder_id" ]; then
  echo "Reminder not found: Old grocery draft"
  exit 1
fi
remindctl delete "$reminder_id" --force
